channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 16.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer’s premiership ‘falling apart’, opponents claim, after Healey resigns over defence funding – UK politics live

item.title: BBC Politics: Healey quits as defence secretary amid military spending row
